last_action.summary: MJT Analytics wired in via direct static imports from https://analytics.mjt.pub/analytics.js. init() + pageView() at startup, track() on Generate, Copy Share Link, Print, New Puzzle, Show Solution. First pass used a local wrapper module; corrected per human feedback to match the brief (no wrapping, hosted helper owns fire-and-forget).
